themes.label: Suffering

Commentary leans on "Thomas Aquinas on Commentary on Job: In Chapter II I explained that there were two opinions h...". Word-study detail reinforces "עָ֝מָ֗ל: sorrow - toil, i.e., wearing effort; hence, worry, whether of body or mind".
